user_query: Design a novel composite health index that can serve as an original contribution.
ai_response_summary: Proposed the Global Health Resilience Index (GHRI) with 5 pillars: Disease Burden, Risk Factor Control, Health System Capacity, Socioeconomic Foundation, and Resilience & Equity. Key design choices: (1) PCA-derived weights within each pillar to avoid arbitrary weighting, (2) min-max normalization for comparability, (3) geometric mean across pillars (penalizes imbalance more than arithmetic mean), (4) bootstrap confidence intervals for rank uncertainty. This is methodologically superior to simple additive indices and provides practical utility as an annually updatable policy tool.
outcome: Implemented in features/indices.py with compute_ghri() and bootstrap_ghri_ci()
